title: Regolamenti dwar Retirement Pensions (Exemption)
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/514.2/mlt, expression eli/sl/514.2/20150115/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
RETIREMENT PENSIONS (EXEMPTION)

[ L.S.514.02

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 514.02
REGOLAMENTI DWAR
RETIREMENT PENSIONS (EXEMPTION)*
1 ta’ Jannar, 2015 *
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 6 tal-2015, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 49 of 2020.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*ara r-regolament regulation 1(2) ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti, kif promulgati
oriġinarjament.

1
